zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Astley於大約1237年出生在英國瓦維其可爾時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Astley23歲，母親Joan de Bois15歲。她於1262年之前與William I Bermingham在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1275年享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Astley于大约1237年出生在英国瓦維其可爾时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Astley23岁，母亲Joan de Bois15岁。她于1262年之前与William I Bermingham在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1275年享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Astley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places in England called Astley (in Lancashire, Shropshire, Warwickshire, Worcestershire, and Yorkshire), from Old English ēast ‘east’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The modern surname seems to be particularly associated with the one in Warwickshire. See also Astle .

variants.name: Astle
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire called Astle, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + hyll ‘hill’. There may also have been some confusion with Asthall and Astley . Or occasionally this may be a topographic name denoting residence on an ‘east hill’ (from Middle English ast + hill or hull), i.e. a hill to the east of a settlement.
English: perhaps also a habitational name from Astwell, Northamptonshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + wielle ‘spring’.
English: habitational name from Asthall, Oxfordshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + halh ‘nook’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Astley was born about 1237, in Warwickshire, England, her father, Sir Thomas de Astley, was 23 and her mother, Joan de Bois, was 15. She married William I Bermingham before 1262, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1275, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Astley est née environ 1237, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas de Astley, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Joan de Bois, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé William I Bermingham avant 1262, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1275, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Astley um 1237 in Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas de Astley 23 und ihre Mutter Joan de Bois 15. Sie hat vor 1262 in England William I Bermingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1275 im Alter von 39 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Astley è nata il circa 1237 nel Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas de Astley, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Joan de Bois, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato William I Bermingham prima del 1262, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1275, all'età di 39 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Astley(이)가 대략 1237년 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Astley(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Bois(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1262년 이전 영국에서 William I Bermingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1275년 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Astley родилась около 1237 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Astley было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Bois, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William I Bermingham перед 1262 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1275 г. в возрасте 39 лет.
